ocr_findings.description: A decorative computer/monitor icon appears in the image next to the Lesson header; OCR renders a lone 'M' character on its own line (OCR line 5). Cosmetic artifact with no meaning impact.

A '学習のポイント' sidebar box in the image ('すべてを完璧に理解する必要はない' with a key icon) is captured as a plain section heading in the OCR without the box/sidebar formatting indicator. Content preserved, structure lost.

reviewer_notes: Content page Lesson 00-03 covering effective study methods including first-pass reading strategy, the 60% pass threshold note, and the スキマ時間 tip. All substantive text captured correctly. OCR truncates at the start of the 'スキマ時間と寝る前の10分を活用する' section (image has more text below visible area), which is expected page-boundary behavior. Two low-severity cosmetic issues noted.
